{{Infobox artifact
| name = Harmony's axe
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Harmony's axe]] is a savage-looking axe with a bone haft.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c7">''Underlord'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] possesses [[Harmony's axe]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] holds [[Harmony's axe]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c13">''Underlord'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Harmony's axe]] is an item held by [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
